templates.name: Mutual NDA (Standard Terms)
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement standard terms, for two parties sharing confidential information with each other.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page companion to the Common Paper Mutual NDA that captures the fillable business terms and incorporates the standard terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage collaborations between a vendor and a design partner customer.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement standard terms, designed to be used alongside the Cloud Service Agreement to define uptime and support commitments.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for engagements involving statements of work and deliverables.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement addressing GDPR and similar data-protection obligations between controllers and processors.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for commercial partnerships such as reseller, referral, and go-to-market relationships.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for licensing software (including on-premise or downloadable software) to customers.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for short-term trial or evaluation engagements that may lead to a full commercial agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA-compliant handling of protected health information between covered entities and business associates.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum that can be attached to an existing commercial agreement to address terms specific to AI features and data usage.
